overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, industrial waterfront structures, and digital billboards. The camera moves along a wooden promenade before ascending an exterior concrete staircase, following the environment from open waterfront to enclosed stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with neon skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront promenade admiring neon-lit skyscrapers

entered.detail: towering futuristic buildings covered in bright neon signage and advertisements
metal safety barrier along the edge of the wooden walkway
large metal truss bridge with industrial framework extending over water

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet wooden waterfront promenade with towering neon-lit skyscrapers dominating the background. The industrial bridge structure becomes visible on the left as the camera moves forward through the open waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with digital advertising displays

events.description: industrial bridge structure becomes prominent feature on left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along waterfront past industrial metal structures

dark modern building exterior with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: Moving past the industrial bridge structure with large digital billboards coming into view on the building facades. The neon skyscrapers recede into the background as the camera progresses along the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exterior with large advertising displays

events.description: camera turns left to follow building facade

agents.ego_description: turning to follow building exterior and approaching stairway entrance

entered.detail: wide exterior staircase ascending along the building wall
metal handrail along the right side of the stairway

segments.scene_description: Turning left to follow the building exterior lined with large digital billboards. The camera approaches a concrete stairway leading upward while the waterfront and industrial structures pass out of view.

events.description: following pedestrian in red clothing up the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing exterior staircase following a person ahead

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing climbing stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: concrete wall with spray paint markings and tags

segments.scene_description: Ascending the concrete exterior staircase with metal railings, following a person in red clothing ahead. The walls feature graffiti and the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera climbs upward away from the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, neon-lit waterfront promenade into the enclosed confines of an industrial concrete stairwell. It begins by gliding along a wet wooden walkway with towering skyscrapers dominating the skyline, as an industrial bridge structure gradually emerges on the left. As the camera progresses, the skyscrapers recede and the view shifts toward building facades adorned with large, glowing digital billboards. The scene then turns left to follow the building's exterior, leaving the open waterfront behind as it approaches a concrete stairway. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs behind a person in red clothing, moving past graffiti-covered walls and metal railings as the environment becomes increasingly narrow and enclosed.
